features.name: unconditional begin/end in generate block
features.description: Code should include an unconditional begin/end block within a generate construct (without if wrapper)
features.snippet:
generate
  begin : label
    wire foo = 1'b0;
  end
endgenerate

features.name: if_1_begin pattern for named scope in generate
features.description: Code should include an if (1) begin/end block pattern within a generate construct to introduce a new named scope
features.snippet:
generate
  if (1) begin : label
    wire foo = 1'b0;
  end
endgenerate

features.name: generate block with nested begin label
features.description: Code should include a generate block containing a begin block with a label for name scope introduction
features.snippet:
module top;
  generate
    begin : scope_name
      logic [7:0] data;
    end
  endgenerate
endmodule
